response_constraints: Confirm the durable memory only after memory_add succeeds.
Mention only the stored key and value; do not expose unrelated memories.

arguments.value: leave ordinary parcels inside the side gate

stages.purpose: Add the explicitly durable fact under a new key; the similarly named temporary memory is not a replacement.

state_assertions: memory["home.delivery_preference"] == "leave ordinary parcels inside the side gate"

memory.home.delivery_preference.temporary: leave ordinary parcels inside the side gate for the current request only

prompt: Please remember as a standing delivery preference: leave ordinary parcels inside the side gate.
